text: SPEAKER_01: Can we talk to Ranjit? SPEAKER_01: Yes ma'am. SPEAKER_00: I am talking to Ranjit from Lakshmi Academy from Noida. SPEAKER_00: Did you do a course on makeup, skin and hair? SPEAKER_01: No, no. SPEAKER_00: You didn't do it. SPEAKER_00: Then why did you fill out the form? SPEAKER_01: I don't know. SPEAKER_01: Sister took the phone. SPEAKER_00: Who? SPEAKER_01: Sister took the phone. SPEAKER_00: Then talk to your sister. SPEAKER_00: Maybe she wants to do it. SPEAKER_01: What do you mean? SPEAKER_01: Is it skincare or makeup? SPEAKER_00: Yes, the hair course, makeup course, beauty parlour course. SPEAKER_01: Yes, how much is the fee? SPEAKER_00: The fee is from 35,000 to different courses. SPEAKER_00: Where do you live? SPEAKER_01: We live in Uttar Pradesh. SPEAKER_00: We are also living in Uttar Pradesh, we are not Noida. SPEAKER_00: So from which place in Uttar Pradesh? SPEAKER_01: Mahoba. SPEAKER_00: What? SPEAKER_01: Mahoba, UB 590. SPEAKER_00: Mahoba? SPEAKER_01: Yes. SPEAKER_00: Okay. SPEAKER_00: So you can come to Narda for the course? SPEAKER_01: Ma'am, the fees are increasing. SPEAKER_00: Okay, what have you thought about? SPEAKER_00: How much is your budget? SPEAKER_01: Budget is less. SPEAKER_00: How much? SPEAKER_01: 20,000. SPEAKER_00: 20,000. SPEAKER_00: How will you live here? SPEAKER_00: How will you eat? SPEAKER_00: Does anyone live here? SPEAKER_01: No. SPEAKER_00: Then you must also need to live there. SPEAKER_01: Yes. SPEAKER_00: Then you will be able to do it. SPEAKER_01: Ma'am, I mean there... SPEAKER_01: Can we do it? SPEAKER_01: And can we teach it? SPEAKER_00: No, no. SPEAKER_00: First you will learn and then you will do it. SPEAKER_01: No, ma'am. SPEAKER_01: If there is such a job, it will be of a helper. SPEAKER_00: How will you get a job if you don't know anything from before? SPEAKER_01: No, ma'am. SPEAKER_01: It will be of a helper. SPEAKER_00: What? SPEAKER_01: Helping. SPEAKER_00: What does helping mean? SPEAKER_01: Helping. SPEAKER_01: Helping and then we can teach it. SPEAKER_00: It means it is a housekeeping job. SPEAKER_00: Yes. SPEAKER_00: So, will she do it? SPEAKER_01: Yes. SPEAKER_00: So, we will have to see if she is eligible or not, if she has come before or not. SPEAKER_00: What salary will she get? SPEAKER_00: Will she get a salary of 8-10 thousand? SPEAKER_01: Yes. SPEAKER_01: So, the makeup that we do in weddings, we have to learn that. SPEAKER_00: Yes, yes, yes. SPEAKER_00: We will teach you that, but you will have to come for that. SPEAKER_01: So, ma'am, how old is she? SPEAKER_00: It will be done in 35,000. SPEAKER_00: Makeup, day shelf makeup, party makeup, evening party makeup, engagement, bridal, everything will be done. SPEAKER_01: It will be done in 35,000. SPEAKER_00: Yes, it will be done in 35,000. SPEAKER_01: Thanks ma'am. SPEAKER_01: Okay, I will tell you now. SPEAKER_00: Okay, till when will you tell? SPEAKER_01: I will tell you, I will talk to him for some time. SPEAKER_00: Okay, I will share your address and details. SPEAKER_00: You tell me on the same number. SPEAKER_01: Okay. SPEAKER_00: Okay? SPEAKER_01: Yes. SPEAKER_00: Okay, thank you.
